features.name: undriven wire in or expression connected to submodule input
features.description: Code should include an undriven wire (declared but not assigned) used in an OR operation, where the result is connected to a submodule's input port

features.name: uninitialized wire declaration
features.description: Code should include a wire declaration without any assignment, creating an undriven net

features.name: or expression with driven and undriven operands
features.description: Code should include an OR operation combining a driven signal with an undriven wire, where the result drives a submodule input
